changeSet.author: litebito
changeSet.comment: Correct the system_avatar.mime_type value from the non-standard "img/png" seeded by the legacy schema35 changesets to the standard "image/png". Idempotent: a fresh install where schema35 has already been corrected (no rows match WHERE mime_type = 'img/png') results in a no-op UPDATE. Fixes #115.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE system_avatar SET mime_type = 'image/png' WHERE mime_type = 'img/png'

rollback.sql: UPDATE system_avatar SET mime_type = 'img/png' WHERE mime_type = 'image/png'
